events.description: Join fellow entrepreneurs for networking, pizza, and insights from local startup founders. This month's featured speaker will discuss scaling SaaS businesses.

events.description: Annual technology and entrepreneurship conference featuring workshops, panels, and networking opportunities for Northeast Indiana's tech community.

events.description: Casual networking event for entrepreneurs, freelancers, and small business owners in the South Bend area. Drink specials and appetizers provided.
